item.title: Power of Silence
item.description: Quote “The most dangerous person is the one who listens, thinks, and observes” Key Learnings: Law #4 from Robert Greene’s “48 Laws of Power” emphasizes saying less than necessary.

item.title: <% tp.file.title %>
item.description: One-liner insight or summary of this idea.

item.title: GET EPIC SHIT DONE!
item.description: Quote “The only person you need to be better than is the person you were yesterday.” Focuses on self-growth and progress, rather than comparing oneself to others.

item.title: People change when they ...
item.description: People change when they … Hurt enough that they have to, Learn enough that they want to, and Receive enough that they are able to.

item.title: A Note on Desires
item.description: Quote “Most of our desires aren’t actually our own. Instead, we learn what to want by observing others” GET EPIC SHIT DONE!.

item.title: The Hidden Power of Stillness
item.description: The Hidden Power of Stillness In our hyper-connected, always-on world, busyness is often worn as a badge of honor.

item.title: Deep Work vs Flow
item.description: Both Deep Work and Flow help you get into the zone, but they aren’t the same. One is structured, the other is immersive.

item.title: New Ulra Tweet file
item.description: jasdlk;fjasdklfhjasdjkl;fhsdkl;fhjklads;fhasdfhjkl;asdfjk; jfkldhf;jkah fjkdashnf;vsda #klhndf;asdhf asfhja; @kofjdofj fop;ij v ieaugh.

item.title: The Insight @ Aroice
item.description: Vision into tech, systems, and intentional living. Read. Think. Build.
